forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KTBNHSR4EVTVJ35MGGD510R2
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '9780'
+project: local-review
+title: Migrate mirdan validator deploy/scan paths from .avp/validators to ./.validators + $XDG_DATA_HOME/validators
+---
+## What
+The validator **loader** now reads from `./.validators/` (project) and `$XDG_DATA_HOME/validators/` (user) via the new `ValidatorsConfig` (task 01KTBNHSR4EVTVJ35MGGD510R2). But mirdan's install/deploy/list/scan pipeline still targets the OLD `.avp/validators/` layout, so validators installed via `mirdan install` land where the loader no longer looks.
+
+Migrate mirdan's validator paths to match the loader:
+- `crates/mirdan/src/install.rs` ‚Äî deploy target `.avp/validators/` ‚Üí `./.validators/` (project) and `$XDG_DATA_HOME/avp/validators` ‚Üí `$XDG_DATA_HOME/validators` (global). Update tests asserting `.avp/validators`.
+- `crates/mirdan/src/list.rs` ‚Äî scan `.avp/validators` and `~/.avp/validators` ‚Üí new dirs.
+- `crates/mirdan/src/info.rs` ‚Äî `.avp/validators` lookups.
+- `crates/mirdan/src/git_source.rs` ‚Äî priority-directory entry `.avp/validators`.
+- `crates/mirdan/src/new.rs` `run_new_validator` global path `avp/validators/<name>` ‚Üí `$XDG_DATA_HOME/validators/<name>` (use `ValidatorsConfig`).
+- `crates/mirdan/src/cli.rs` / `lib.rs` doc strings mentioning `.avp/validators/`.
+
+Once mirdan no longer references `$XDG_DATA_HOME/avp/validators`, re-evaluate whether `AvpConfig` is still needed at all (mirdan `run_new_tool` still uses `avp/tools`).
+
+## Why deferred
+Out of scope for the format/loader task, which the implement skill scoped to "the loader's directory constants + docs". Migrating mirdan's full deploy pipeline is a separate, sizable change with its own test surface (~15 assertions across install.rs).
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] mirdan deploys/scans validators at `./.validators/` and `$XDG_DATA_HOME/validators/` ‚Äî consistent with `ValidatorLoader`.
+- [ ] No mirdan code references `.avp/validators` or `$XDG_DATA_HOME/avp/validators`.
+- [ ] `cargo test -p mirdan` green.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -27,4 +27,12 @@
 ## Acceptance Criteria
 - [ ] mirdan deploys/scans validators at `./.validators/` and `$XDG_DATA_HOME/validators/` ‚Äî consistent with `ValidatorLoader`.
 - [ ] No mirdan code references `.avp/validators` or `$XDG_DATA_HOME/avp/validators`.
-- [ ] `cargo test -p mirdan` green.
\ No newline at end of file
+- [ ] `cargo test -p mirdan` green.
+
+## Review Findings (2026-06-05 12:31)
+
+### Blockers
+- [ ] `crates/mirdan/src/sync.rs:148-157` ‚Äî The `mirdan sync` Validator verification branch still hand-rolls the OLD layout: global = `~/.avp/validators`, project = `.avp/validators`. This violates the acceptance criterion "No mirdan code references `.avp/validators`" and is a functional bug ‚Äî `deploy_validator` now writes to `.validators/` / `$XDG_DATA_HOME/validators/`, so `sync` will report every installed validator as a missing package (it checks a directory that deploy no longer populates). Fix: route this branch through the new source-of-truth ‚Äî `let validators_dir = crate::install::validators_dir(global);` ‚Äî exactly as `list.rs`/`info.rs`/`guess_installed_type` already do, instead of building `.avp/validators` by hand. Note the global path must become the XDG location (`validators_dir(true)`), not the home-relative `~/.avp/validators` it was. No mirdan test currently exercises this branch, which is why `cargo test -p mirdan` is green despite the bug; add coverage for the validator sync path.
+
+### Warnings
+- [ ] `crates/mirdan/src/install.rs:2589-2598` (`validators_dir`) ‚Äî CWD-vs-git-root divergence. The loader resolves its project dir via `ManagedDirectory::<ValidatorsConfig>::from_git_root()` ‚Üí `<git_root>/.validators`, while mirdan's `validators_dir(false)` returns CWD-relative `PathBuf::from(".validators")`. These agree when `mirdan install` runs from the git root (the common case, and what the old CWD-relative `.avp/validators` also did), but diverge when run from a subdirectory: mirdan writes `<cwd>/.validators` while the loader reads `<git_root>/.validators`, so the validator is deployed where the loader won't find it. Judged acceptable-but-noted, not a blocker: it preserves the pre-existing CWD-relative convention and stays consistent with how every other mirdan package type (skills/tools/agents) resolves project paths (CWD-relative via `current_dir()`/`rooted()`). Consider a follow-up to make `validators_dir(false)` git-root-relative for exact parity with the loader, ideally unifying both on the same `ManagedDirectory` resolver.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -25,14 +25,14 @@
 Out of scope for the format/loader task, which the implement skill scoped to "the loader's directory constants + docs". Migrating mirdan's full deploy pipeline is a separate, sizable change with its own test surface (~15 assertions across install.rs).

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] mirdan deploys/scans validators at `./.validators/` and `$XDG_DATA_HOME/validators/` ‚Äî consistent with `ValidatorLoader`.
-- [ ] No mirdan code references `.avp/validators` or `$XDG_DATA_HOME/avp/validators`.
-- [ ] `cargo test -p mirdan` green.
+- [x] mirdan deploys/scans validators at `./.validators/` and `$XDG_DATA_HOME/validators/` ‚Äî consistent with `ValidatorLoader`.
+- [x] No mirdan code references `.avp/validators` or `$XDG_DATA_HOME/avp/validators`.
+- [x] `cargo test -p mirdan` green.

 ## Review Findings (2026-06-05 12:31)

 ### Blockers
-- [ ] `crates/mirdan/src/sync.rs:148-157` ‚Äî The `mirdan sync` Validator verification branch still hand-rolls the OLD layout: global = `~/.avp/validators`, project = `.avp/validators`. This violates the acceptance criterion "No mirdan code references `.avp/validators`" and is a functional bug ‚Äî `deploy_validator` now writes to `.validators/` / `$XDG_DATA_HOME/validators/`, so `sync` will report every installed validator as a missing package (it checks a directory that deploy no longer populates). Fix: route this branch through the new source-of-truth ‚Äî `let validators_dir = crate::install::validators_dir(global);` ‚Äî exactly as `list.rs`/`info.rs`/`guess_installed_type` already do, instead of building `.avp/validators` by hand. Note the global path must become the XDG location (`validators_dir(true)`), not the home-relative `~/.avp/validators` it was. No mirdan test currently exercises this branch, which is why `cargo test -p mirdan` is green despite the bug; add coverage for the validator sync path.
+- [x] `crates/mirdan/src/sync.rs` ‚Äî The `mirdan sync` Validator verification branch hand-rolled the OLD layout (global `~/.avp/validators`, project `.avp/validators`), so `sync` reported every installed validator as missing because `deploy_validator` now writes to the new dirs. FIXED: the branch now routes through `crate::install::validators_dir(global)` ‚Äî the same source of truth as `list.rs`/`info.rs`/`guess_installed_type`. The global path is now the XDG location (`validators_dir(true)`), not home-relative `~/.avp/validators`. Removed the now-unused `PathBuf` import. Added regression coverage: `test_sync_validator_present_in_project_dir` (TDD: failed before the fix, passes after) verifies a validator deployed to `validators_dir(false)` is counted as verified, not missing; `test_sync_validator_missing` was made `#[serial]` with CWD isolation so the project-relative `.validators/` lookup is deterministic. `cargo test -p mirdan` = 387 passed / 0 failed; `cargo clippy -p mirdan --all-targets` clean.

 ### Warnings
-- [ ] `crates/mirdan/src/install.rs:2589-2598` (`validators_dir`) ‚Äî CWD-vs-git-root divergence. The loader resolves its project dir via `ManagedDirectory::<ValidatorsConfig>::from_git_root()` ‚Üí `<git_root>/.validators`, while mirdan's `validators_dir(false)` returns CWD-relative `PathBuf::from(".validators")`. These agree when `mirdan install` runs from the git root (the common case, and what the old CWD-relative `.avp/validators` also did), but diverge when run from a subdirectory: mirdan writes `<cwd>/.validators` while the loader reads `<git_root>/.validators`, so the validator is deployed where the loader won't find it. Judged acceptable-but-noted, not a blocker: it preserves the pre-existing CWD-relative convention and stays consistent with how every other mirdan package type (skills/tools/agents) resolves project paths (CWD-relative via `current_dir()`/`rooted()`). Consider a follow-up to make `validators_dir(false)` git-root-relative for exact parity with the loader, ideally unifying both on the same `ManagedDirectory` resolver.
\ No newline at end of file
+- [x] `crates/mirdan/src/install.rs` (`validators_dir`) ‚Äî CWD-vs-git-root divergence. Reviewed and intentionally left as-is per the reviewer's own "acceptable-but-noted, not a blocker" judgment: `validators_dir(false)` stays CWD-relative (`.validators`), preserving the pre-existing convention and staying consistent with how every other mirdan package type resolves project paths (CWD-relative). The sync fix above routes through this same `validators_dir`, so deploy and sync are now consistent with each other regardless of this resolver choice. Full git-root unification of `validators_dir(false)` with the loader's `ManagedDirectory::from_git_root()` remains a follow-up, not addressed here (out of scope for this task per the implement instructions).
\ No newline at end of file
